name: Auto-suggest fixes verified with a real security PR containing eval() and XSS issues
description: Use OWASP NodeGoat PR #300 which contains eval(req.body.preTax) and XSS vulnerabilities. The AI should detect these issues and return actual fix suggestions with broken and fixed code blocks.

planSteps.description: Paste 'https://github.com/OWASP/NodeGoat/pull/300' into the PR URL input and click 'Analyze PR'
Wait for the review report to fully load — the spinner should disappear and review cards appear
A review report is visible with a quality score and verdict badge — the score should be below 85 given the security issues in this PR
The Security Issues card shows at least one issue mentioning eval, injection, or XSS
A section titled '🔧 Auto-suggested Fixes' is visible below the review cards
At least one fix suggestion card is visible inside the section — showing a red issue title, two code panels labeled '❌ Current Code' and '✅ Fixed Code'
A 'Copy Fix' button is visible on at least one suggestion card
Click the 'Copy Fix' button on the first suggestion card
The button text changes to 'Copied ✓' within 2 seconds
An explanation text starting with '💡' is visible below at least one suggestion's code blocks
